DESCRIPTION:
Given the user is on the checkout form
When they click Cancel (without filling any fields)
Then they are returned to the cart page with no side effects
NAME: TC-CHK-005: Cancel On Checkout Returns To Cart

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user is on the Inventory page
When selecting each sort option
Then the first product matches the expected sort order
NAME: TC-INV-004: Products Sort Correctly By Each Criterion

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user has just logged in and landed on the Inventory page
When the cart is empty
Then the cart badge is not displayed
NAME: TC-INV-006: Cart Badge Is Hidden When Cart Is Empty

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user is on the login page
When the username is non-empty and password is empty, then click Login
Then the error "Password is required" is displayed
NAME: TC-LOGIN-004: Empty Password Is Rejected

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user is on the login page
When they attempt to log in with a locked-out account
Then an error containing "locked out" is displayed and the user remains on the login page
NAME: TC-LOGIN-005: Locked-Out User Is Denied

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user is on the checkout form
When Postal Code is empty and Continue is clicked
Then an error containing "Postal Code" is displayed
NAME: TC-CHK-004: Empty Postal Code Rejected On Checkout

DESCRIPTION:
Given the cart is empty
When 2 items are added sequentially
Then the badge shows 1, then 2
NAME: TC-INV-007: Cart Badge Increments As Items Are Added

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user is logged in
When they land on the Inventory page
Then 6 products are displayed with the title "Products"
NAME: TC-INV-001: Inventory Displays Exactly 6 Products After Login

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user is on the login page
When the username is empty and password is non-empty, then click Login
Then the error "Username is required" is displayed
NAME: TC-LOGIN-003: Empty Username Is Rejected

DESCRIPTION:
Given the cart has 2 items
When clicking Remove on 1 of them
Then the item count drops to 1 and the removed item is no longer in the list
NAME: TC-CART-002: Removing An Item Decrements Count And Removes From List

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user is on the login page
When they enter a correct username but a wrong password and click Login
Then the page stays on the login page and displays an error containing "do not match"
NAME: TC-LOGIN-002: Wrong Password Is Rejected

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user visits the login page
When the page finishes loading
Then the username input, password input, and Login button are all visible,
and the button reads "Login"
NAME: TC-LOGIN-006: Login Page Renders Required Elements

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user has just logged in without adding items
When navigating to the Cart page
Then the cart is empty (item count = 0)
NAME: TC-CART-004: Empty Cart Shows Zero Items

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user added 1 item (badge shows 1)
When navigating to the cart and back to Inventory
Then the badge still shows 1 and the item remains in the cart
NAME: TC-CART-003: Cart Badge Survives Navigation Away And Back

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user selects "Price (low to high)"
When iterating over the price list
Then prices are in non-decreasing order
NAME: TC-INV-005: Price Low-To-High Sort Is Numerically Correct

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user is on the checkout form
When First Name is empty and Continue is clicked
Then an error containing "First Name" is displayed
NAME: TC-CHK-002: Empty First Name Rejected On Checkout

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user is on the Inventory page
When iterating over all products
Then every product has a non-empty name and a price > $0
NAME: TC-INV-002: Every Product Has Non-Empty Name And Positive Price

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user's cart has items
When they complete the shipping form, review the order, and click Finish
Then a "Thank you" confirmation is displayed
and clicking Back Home returns to Inventory
NAME: TC-CHK-001: Complete Purchase From Cart To Confirmation

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user is on the checkout form
When Last Name is empty and Continue is clicked
Then an error containing "Last Name" is displayed
NAME: TC-CHK-003: Empty Last Name Rejected On Checkout

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user added N items from the Inventory
When navigating to the Cart page
Then the cart displays N items with names matching those added
NAME: TC-CART-001: Items Added From Inventory Appear In Cart

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user adds 1 item
When clicking Remove on that item
Then the badge returns to zero
NAME: TC-INV-008: Add Then Remove Resets Cart Badge To Zero

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user is on the login page
When they enter a correct username and password and click Login
Then the page redirects to /inventory.html, displaying the "Products" title
NAME: TC-LOGIN-001: Valid Credentials Grant Access

DESCRIPTION:
Given the cart has items
When viewing the checkout button
Then the button is visible and enabled
NAME: TC-CART-005: Checkout Button Is Visible And Enabled

DESCRIPTION:
Given the user is on the Inventory page
When viewing each product
Then every product image is visible and has a valid src attribute
NAME: TC-INV-003: Every Product Image Has Valid Source
